blocking_issues.title: Middleware ordering — DynamicSystemPromptMiddleware fires after AnthropicPromptCachingMiddleware
blocking_issues.evidence: SDK create_deep_agent() line 188-189: 'if middleware: deepagent_middleware.extend(middleware)' — explicit middleware appended AFTER auto-attached stack. Docstring: 'middleware: Additional middleware to apply after the standard middleware stack'. Cache breakpoints set on stale system prompts before DynamicSystemPromptMiddleware rewrites them.
blocking_issues.remediation: Move DynamicSystemPromptMiddleware logic into pre-model hook that fires before caching, or request SDK support for middleware priority/ordering, or implement cache invalidation wrapper after prompt rewrite

blocking_issues.title: Missing interrupt_on parameter in research-agent create_deep_agent() call
blocking_issues.evidence: create_deep_agent() call passes model, tools, system_prompt, middleware, backend, checkpointer, store, name — but NOT interrupt_on. PM graph (graph.py:166-169) correctly passes interrupt_on. request_approval_tool in tools list but graph will not pause.
blocking_issues.remediation: Add interrupt_on={"request_approval": True} to the create_deep_agent() call in research_agent.py

non_blocking_issues.title: Orchestrator tracing completely missing
non_blocking_issues.evidence: No @traceable decorators on graph nodes, stage logic, middleware hooks, or delegation decisions. Stubs in tracing.py have zero call sites.

non_blocking_issues.title: Research-agent @traceable imported but unused
non_blocking_issues.evidence: Line 34 imports traceable but no functions decorated. SDK auto-tracing covers critical path.
